sections.heading: Copy Your Deployment's Connection Information
sections.body:
To find and copy your deployment's connection information:

- Locate the cluster to which to connect from
  the list of clusters.

- Click the Connect button to the right of your
  cluster's name.

A Connect dialog box appears with a list of available
connection methods.

Follow the directions under
Connecting with MongoDB for VS Code to
create a connection to your cluster.

sections.heading: Create a Connection to a Deployment
sections.body:
For instructions on creating a connection to your
cluster using VS Code, see
[Connect to Your MongoDB Deployment](mongodb-vscode/connect)
in the MongoDB for VS Code documentation. If you copied your Atlas
connection string in the previous procedure, follow the steps to use
your Atlas connection string.

> **Tip:** The [Connect to Your MongoDB Deployment](mongodb-vscode/connect)
> page also provides information on disconnecting from a deployment
> and information on activating, renaming and removing a connection.
